source_document: UTILMD AHB Gas G1.1 konsolidierte Lesefassung Stand 27.03.2026

segment_rules._description: AGR is optional per MIG G1.1 (no AHB constraint for PID 44001)
COM is optional per MIG G1.1 (no AHB constraint for PID 44001)
CTA is optional per MIG G1.1 (no AHB constraint for PID 44001)
LOC is optional per MIG G1.1 (no AHB constraint for PID 44001)
STS is optional per MIG G1.1 (no AHB constraint for PID 44001)

group_rules._description: UTILMD SG2 NAD (Marktteilnehmer): sender NAD+MS and receiver NAD+MR must appear in every SG2 occurrence. Qualifier 3035 must be one of ['MS', 'MR']. Source: UTILMD MIG, §2 Segment group SG2.
UTILMD SG6 RFF (Referenz in IDE-Gruppe): Vorgangsnummer Z13 mandatory in every SG6 occurrence within SG4. Qualifier 1153 must be one of ['Z13']. Source: UTILMD MIG, §2 Segment group SG6.

conditional_rules._description: [48] Wenn STS+E01++E14 (Status: Ablehnung Sonstiges) vorhanden, ist FTX Pflicht
[84] Wenn STS+E01++Z35 (Ablehnung Abmeldeanfrage) vorhanden, ist FTX Pflicht
